extortion.description: Molod Spitz & DeSantis, P.C. specializes in defending clients in complex liability matters in New York and New Jersey courts. The firm prides itself on being trial-ready, with a long record of successful verdicts and a commitment to tracking metrics that reflect their results. We are going to upload 62GB of corporate data. Employee documents, medical information, confidential agreements, lots of customersinformation, detailed finance and accounting files, lots of clients information, contract and agreements with customers, police reports, investigations, court hearings, NDAs, etc.
